meta.name: Gyu Min Lee
meta.title: Postdoctoral Researcher
meta.affiliation: KRIBB (Korea Research Institute of Bioscience and Biotechnology), Center for Synthetic Biology

about.heading: Systems biology, applied to C1 carbon.
about.lead: Postdoctoral researcher at KRIBB Center for Synthetic Biology, working on C1 microbe engineering with AI coding agents in the loop.

facets.label: Research
facets.body: Methanotroph and methylotroph engineering for C1 chemistry. Adaptive laboratory evolution (ALE) of *Methylorubrum extorquens* under methanol stress (700+ generations, PhD work at UNIST).

facets.label: Methods
facets.body: Whole-genome sequencing + RNA-seq + AlphaFold3 structural analysis to read mutations as a coherent stress-response network.

facets.label: Tools
facets.body: Custom dry-lab tooling on top of AI coding agents — primer design, NGS verification, lab notebook automation — so the wet-lab cycle never has to wait.

items.institution: Ulsan National Institute of Science and Technology (UNIST)
items.lab: Systems Biology Lab, advisor: Donghyuk Kim, Ph.D.
items.highlight: Dissertation: Systems-level characterization of adaptive responses to methanol stress in *Methylorubrum extorquens*.

items.lab: C1 team led by Hyewon Lee, Ph.D.
items.highlight: Methanotroph strain engineering, multi-omics pipelines, agentic tooling for the C1 team.
Methylotroph ALE, pan-genome and DEG analysis, bacteriophage and plant-pathogen comparative genomics.

columns.label: Engineering
items: Claude Code agent workflows for synthetic biology
GitHub Actions CI and cron jobs
